rationale: Educ. Code §43.007 governs State Board of Education authority to purchase, sell, or exchange securities for the permanent school fund. It is unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The State Board of Education may authorize the purchase of all of the types of securities in which it is authorized by law to invest the permanent school fund in either registered or negotiable form.
_note: No operative conflict. §43.007 addresses securities transactions for the permanent school fund; proposed homestead exemption increase does not implicate this statute.
